assertion_results.text: Output must address ownership ambiguity explicitly
assertion_results.evidence: Dedicated 'Ownership & culture' section states: 'No product owner means no one is accountable for prioritization — "urgent" becomes whatever is loudest.' Executive summary adds: 'leadership instability (3 VPs in 18 months) has eroded ownership culture.' Pattern identification section also flags: 'Cultural flags (leadership instability, no PO, process bypasses under urgency) → ownership and trust problem'.

assertion_results.text: Output must mention both CI systems by name (CircleCI and GitHub Actions)
assertion_results.evidence: Phase 0 table (row 5): 'two systems (CircleCI + GitHub Actions), authority unclear'. Top 3 blockers: 'CircleCI and GitHub Actions coexist with no agreed deployment source of truth'. CI/CD findings: 'CircleCI was the original system; GitHub Actions was added 6 months ago. Neither has been formally designated as the deployment authority.'

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item that is actionable despite the chaos
assertion_results.evidence: Short term section includes: 'Run the full test suite once (against a non-production environment if possible) and record how many tests pass. This gives you a baseline.' Also: 'Designate GitHub Actions as the single CI authority for deployments and disable or archive CircleCI build triggers.' Both are concrete steps executable without resolving the broader organisational problems.

assertion_results.text: Output must score Ownership & culture at 2/5 or lower
assertion_results.evidence: Area scores table: '| 🔴 Ownership & culture  |  1/5  | 3 VPs in 18 months, no PO, urgency bypasses process'. Score is 1/5, which is at or below the 2/5 threshold.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend a full team reorganisation
assertion_results.evidence: No recommendation for team reorganisation appears anywhere in the report. Long-term items include adding a product owner ('Get a product owner formally assigned to the Platform team') and securing leadership commitment, but no restructuring of the team or reporting lines is proposed.
